premise: A cosplay-remix short shows one young female lead dancing in a casual bedroom look while an inserted reference card previews the target character, then uses a hand-over-lens wipe to reveal her in a Finn-inspired costume in the same room.
plot_type: reference-card setup to cosplay reveal with hand-wipe transition

cast.description: One female lead carries the full story. The same performer is present before and after the transition, with the hand wipe belonging to her rather than to a second person.

continuity_rules: Only one female lead should appear. Do not add friends, parents, partners, alternate-age variants, or any second live performer.
The beige bedroom remains locked across the whole short: slanted ceiling, black ceiling fan, white door, small shelf on the left, and desk plus hanging vines on the right.
Scene_001 includes a separate square character-card overlay that previews the later costume. Treat that card as an inserted graphic layer, not as wardrobe, a second character, or a background poster.
The hand-over-lens wipe is the only transformation bridge between the casual look and the cosplay reveal. Do not blend both wardrobes inside the same base scene clip.
The final costume should clearly echo the character shown in the scene_001 overlay card: white bear-ear hat, turquoise body, blue lower garment, and lime-green backpack silhouette.
No intentional text needs to be regenerated. Remove source watermarks, usernames, and any baked-in TikTok UI.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: The story is fully explained by one on-camera performer plus a non-human graphic overlay. The inserted character card is not a supporting cast member and should stay a separate overlay asset.

scene_arc.beat: Hook the viewer with a casual dance while previewing the target costume through an inserted reference card.
Use a fast hand-over-lens wipe to hide the look change.
Pay off the setup with a full costume reveal in the same room.
